caption: A man with glasses and a light-blue short-sleeved button-down shirt stands behind a brown wooden podium in a room with wood-paneled walls and blinds. He is speaking into a microphone and intermittently raises his right hand to touch or adjust his glasses. A red and white logo is visible on the front of the podium, and the text "ORCA" appears on the right side of the scene. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible as they face the speaker. As the scene progresses, the man continues his gesture, shifting his hand from his cheek to his glasses and back. The lighting is consistent throughout the sequence, and the camera angle remains stationary, capturing the speaker from the waist up while showing the audience in the lower portion of the frame.
